title: Hartogia lycopodiodes
intro: Hartogia lycopodioides, also known as the 'Snake Palm', is a type of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The health benefits of Hartogia lycopodioides include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Hartogia lycopodioides include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used in traditional medicine to treat fever, cough, and other respiratory conditions.

This classification highlights Hartogia lycopodiodes' botanical position among other flowering plants.
